Annotations.title: Annotations
Annotations.description:
Optional hints about tool behavior

Attributes:
    title (Optional[str]): Human-readable title for the tool
    readOnlyHint (Optional[bool]): If true, the tool does not modify its environment
    destructiveHint (Optional[bool]): If true, the tool may perform destructive updates
    idempotentHint (Optional[bool]): If true, repeated calls with same args have no additional effect
    openWorldHint (Optional[bool]): If true, tool interacts with external entities

max_l_dist.title: Max L Dist
max_l_dist.description: Number of charachter varience allowd for matching

successfulDeletions.title: Successfuldeletions
successfulDeletions.description: The guids of the successfully deleted suggestions

failedDeletions.title: Faileddeletions
failedDeletions.description: The guids of the suggestions that failed to delete

Input.title: Input
Input.description:
MCP tool input schema for tool parameters

Attributes:
    type (str): The type of the input schema
    properties (Dict[str, InputProperty]): Dictionary mapping property names to their definitions
    required (List[str]): List of required property names

InputProperty.title: InputProperty
InputProperty.description:
MCP tool input specific parameters

Attributes:
    type (str): The data type of the property
    description (str): Description of what the property represents

MCPToolsResponse.title: MCPToolsResponse
MCPToolsResponse.description:
Response schema for MCP tools api

Attributes:
        tools (List[Tool]): List of MCP Tools
